name: dolphin
description: Linux Dolphin file manager tools for Codex, using filesystem APIs, KDE/Freedesktop commands, and AT-SPI window/selection reads for user-opened Dolphin windows instead of foreground mouse and keyboard control.

interface.shortDescription: Control KDE Dolphin and common file-manager actions
interface.longDescription: Dolphin gives Codex Linux-native file-manager tools for opening folders, revealing files, listing and searching directories, reading user-opened Dolphin windows and selected paths when window access is enabled, creating folders, renaming, copying, moving, trashing, copying paths to the clipboard, opening properties, and opening a terminal at a folder. It uses filesystem APIs, KDE/Freedesktop commands, and AT-SPI window inspection so routine background work does not depend on foreground mouse or keyboard control.
defaultPrompt: Continue from my selected Dolphin files
Create a folder and move these files
